Cursed - Radiant DV.description: The target is cursed. Until the curse ends, the target has Vulnerability to radiant damage.

Cursed - Slashing DV.name: Cursed - Slashing DV
Cursed - Slashing DV.description: The target is cursed. Until the curse ends, the target has Vulnerability to slashing damage.

Cursed - Thunder DV.name: Cursed - Thunder DV
Cursed - Thunder DV.description: The target is cursed. Until the curse ends, the target has Vulnerability to thunder damage.

Inspiring Rally.name: Inspiring Rally
Inspiring Rally.description: [[lookup @name]] chooses up to six allies within [[lookup @range.value activity=4OoBSxFRB5qGY1Rq]] feet. Each target that can hear her can take a Reaction to move up to its Speed without provoking &Reference[Opportunity Attacks].
Inspiring Rally.chat: [[lookup @name]] encourages her allies to act swiftly while there is still an opportunity.

Shield.name: Shield
Shield.description: [[lookup @name]] casts [[/item .1YoNu2C8bScL8dPQ]]{Shield} in response to that spell’s trigger, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

1YoNu2C8bScL8dPQ.name: Shield
1YoNu2C8bScL8dPQ.description: An imperceptible barrier of magical force protects you. Until the start of your next turn, you have a +5 bonus to AC, including against the triggering attack, and you take no damage from @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplMagicMissi]{Magic Missile}.
1YoNu2C8bScL8dPQ.activation: when you are hit by an attack roll or targeted by the Magic Missile spell
1YoNu2C8bScL8dPQ.activationCondition: when you are hit by an attack roll or targeted by the Magic Missile spell

Imperceptible Barrier.name: Imperceptible Barrier
Imperceptible Barrier.description: Until the start of your next turn, you have a +5 bonus to AC, including against the triggering attack, and you take no damage from Magic Missile.

Mage Hand.name: Mage Hand
Mage Hand.description:
A spectral, floating hand appears at a point you choose within range. The hand lasts for the duration. The hand vanishes if it is ever more than 30 feet away from you or if you cast this spell again.

When you cast the spell, you can use the hand to manipulate an object, open an unlocked door or container, stow or retrieve an item from an open container, or pour the contents out of a vial.

As a Magic action on your later turns, you can control the hand thus again. As part of that action, you can move the hand up to 30 feet.

The hand can't attack, activate magic items, or carry more than 10 pounds.

Dispel Evil and Good.name: Dispel Evil and Good
Dispel Evil and Good.description:
For the duration, Celestials, Elementals, Fey, Fiends, and Undead have Disadvantage on attack rolls against you. You can end the spell early by using either of the following special functions.

Break Enchantment. As a Magic action, you touch a creature that is possessed by or has the &Reference[Charmed] or &Reference[Frightened] condition from one or more creatures of the types above. The target is no longer possessed, Charmed, or Frightened by such creatures.

Dismissal. As a Magic action, you target one creature you can see within 5 feet of you that has one of the creature types above. The target must succeed on a Charisma saving throw or be sent back to its home plane if it isn't there already. If they aren't on their home plane, Undead are sent to the Shadowfell, and Fey are sent to the Feywild.

Dismissal.name: Dismissal
Dismissal.target: Celestial, Elemental, Fey, Fiend, or Undead
Dismissal.targetAffects: Celestial, Elemental, Fey, Fiend, or Undead

Break Enchantment.name: Break Enchantment
Break Enchantment.target: Celestial, Elemental, Fey, Fiend, or Undead
Break Enchantment.targetAffects: Celestial, Elemental, Fey, Fiend, or Undead

Dispelling Evil and Good.name: Dispelling Evil and Good
Dispelling Evil and Good.description: For the duration, Celestials, Elementals, Fey, Fiends, and Undead have Disadvantage on attack rolls against you. You can end the spell early by using either of the following special functions: Break Enchantment or Dismissal.

Lightning Bolt.name: Lightning Bolt
Lightning Bolt.description:
A stroke of lightning forming a 100-foot-long, 5-foot-wide Line blasts out from you in a direction you choose. Each creature in the Line makes a Dexterity saving throw, taking 8d6 Lightning damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one.

Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot. The damage increases by 1d6 for each spell slot level above 3.
Lightning Bolt.materials: a bit of fur and a crystal rod

Magic Circle.name: Magic Circle
Magic Circle.description:
You create a 10-foot-radius, 20-foot-tall Cylinder of magical energy centered on a point on the ground that you can see within range. Glowing runes appear wherever the Cylinder intersects with the floor or other surface.

Choose one or more of the following types of creatures: Celestials, Elementals, Fey, Fiends, or Undead. The circle affects a creature of the chosen type in the following ways:

  • The creature can't willingly enter the Cylinder by nonmagical means. If the creature tries to use teleportation or interplanar travel to do so, it must first succeed on a Charisma saving throw.
  • The creature has Disadvantage on attack rolls against targets within the Cylinder.
  • Targets within the Cylinder can't be possessed by or gain the &Reference[charmed apply=false] or &reference[frightened apply=false] condition from the creature.

Each time you cast this spell, you can cause its magic to operate in the reverse direction, preventing a creature of the specified type from leaving the Cylinder and protecting targets outside it.

Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot. The duration increases by 1 hour for each spell slot level above 3.
Magic Circle.materials: salt and powdered silver worth 100+ GP, which the spell consumes

Light.name: Light
Light.description:
You touch one Large or smaller object that isn't being worn or carried by someone else. Until the spell ends, the object sheds Bright Light in a 20-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 20 feet. The light can be colored as you like.

Covering the object with something opaque blocks the light. The spell ends if you cast it again.

Rapier.name: Rapier
Rapier.chat: [[lookup @name]] steps in with a quick and precise thrust of her rapier.

Light Crossbow.name: Light Crossbow
Light Crossbow.chat: [[lookup @name]] carefully aims her crossbow and releases a bolt toward her target.

y1CPU664g3H2ABxc.name: Shield
y1CPU664g3H2ABxc.description: An imperceptible barrier of magical force protects you. Until the start of your next turn, you have a +5 bonus to AC, including against the triggering attack, and you take no damage from @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplMagicMissi]{Magic Missile}.

Multiattack.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] makes two [[/item Whirling Blades]] attacks.

Whirling Blades.name: Whirling Blades
Whirling Blades.chat: Blades spin out from the ghostly figure as the [[lookup @name lowercase]] targets its victim.

Aura of Violence.name: Aura of Violence
Aura of Violence.description:
At the end of each of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]’s turns, each creature of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]’s choice in a [[lookup @target.template.size activity=kmJ6hehQn1rWmWER]]-foot Emanation originating from the [[lookup @name lowercase]] suffers the following effect.

Wisdom Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=kmJ6hehQn1rWmWER]].

Failure: The target takes a Reaction to make a melee attack roll against a creature within reach. If no creature is within reach, the target takes [[/damage average]] damage.
Aura of Violence.chat: A strong gust of wind and a chorus of layered screams erupt from the gallows speaker.

Whirling Form.name: Whirling Form
Whirling Form.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] can enter a creature’s space and stop there.

Howling Wind.name: Howling Wind
Howling Wind.description:
Constitution Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=1gyDqaHiLPf62fSO]], each creature in a [[lookup @target.template.size activity=1gyDqaHiLPf62fSO]]-foot Cone.

Failure: [[/damage average]] damage, and the target has the &Reference[Frightened apply=false] condition for 1 minute. While Frightened in this way, the creature has the &Reference[Deafened apply=false] condition, is compelled to shriek along with the gallows speaker, and can’t cast spells with a Verbal component. The target repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

Success: Half damage only.
Howling Wind.chat: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] unleashes a blast of wind and screams across the space before it.

Frightened & Deafened.name: Frightened & Deafened
Frightened & Deafened.description: the target has the &Reference[Frightened apply=false] condition for 1 minute. While Frightened in this way, the creature has the &Reference[Deafened apply=false] condition, is compelled to shriek along with the gallows speaker, and can’t cast spells with a Verbal component.

Spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
Spellcasting.description:
Gennifer casts one of the following spells, using [[lookup @attributes.spell.abilityLabel]] as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC [[lookup @attributes.spell.dc]]):

At Will: [[/item .jUBt4tJgszGOCQSN]]{Light}, [[/item .OYrM2j62JsCNERZe]]{Mending}

1/Day Each: [[/item .67pQCIeEv4ldlvJU]]{Locate Animals or Plants}, [[/item .kWZboEyYD8PQznE8]]{Magic Circle}, [[/item .A4UQBwbXZy1DKIu8]]{Protection from Poison}

Blessed Dagger.name: Blessed Dagger
Blessed Dagger.chat: Gennifer strikes with her dagger in a quick, practiced motion.

Radiant Wisp.name: Radiant Wisp
Radiant Wisp.chat: A wisp of light gathers in Gennifer's hand before she sends it toward her target.

Occult Aid.name: Occult Aid
Occult Aid.description: Gennifer casts [[/item .3CBFf0wIzlmsytWt]]{Healing Word}, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

Suppressed Lycanthropy.name: Suppressed Lycanthropy
Suppressed Lycanthropy.description: If reduced to 0 Hit Points, Gennifer succumbs to lycanthropy. Her statistics are replaced by those of the @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.actors24.Actor.mmWerewolf000000]{Werewolf} stat block, but she retains her alignment; personality; Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma scores; proficiencies; and languages known. She then immediately revives in her hybrid form with all her Hit Points.

Esoteric Ward.name: Esoteric Ward
Esoteric Ward.description:
Constitution Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=wTip1ZJiumWKzEGZ]], each creature in a [[lookup @target.template.size activity=wTip1ZJiumWKzEGZ]]-foot Emanation originating from Gennifer.

Failure: [[/damage average]] damage. If the target is an Undead creature, it has the &Reference[Stunned apply=false] condition until the end of its next turn.
Esoteric Ward.chat: Gennifer casts a protective ward around herself and then extends it outward.

Stunned.name: Stunned
Stunned.description: If the target is an Undead creature, the target is &Reference[Stunned apply=false] condition until the end of its next turn.

Multiattack.name: Multiattack
Multiattack.description: Gennifer makes two attacks, using [[/item Blessed Dagger]] or [[/item Radiant Wisp]] in any combination.

Mending.name: Mending
Mending.description:
This spell repairs a single break or tear in an object you touch, such as a broken chain link, two halves of a broken key, a torn cloak, or a leaking wineskin. As long as the break or tear is no larger than 1 foot in any dimension, you mend it, leaving no trace of the former damage.

This spell can physically repair a magic item, but it can't restore magic to such an object.

Light.name: Light
Light.description:
You touch one Large or smaller object that isn't being worn or carried by someone else. Until the spell ends, the object sheds Bright Light in a 20-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 20 feet. The light can be colored as you like.

Covering the object with something opaque blocks the light. The spell ends if you cast it again.

Locate Animals or Plants.name: Locate Animals or Plants
Locate Animals or Plants.description: Describe or name a specific kind of Beast, Plant creature, or nonmagical plant. You learn the direction and distance to the closest creature or plant of that kind within 5 miles, if any are present.

Magic Circle.name: Magic Circle
Magic Circle.description:
You create a 10-foot-radius, 20-foot-tall Cylinder of magical energy centered on a point on the ground that you can see within range. Glowing runes appear wherever the Cylinder intersects with the floor or other surface.

Choose one or more of the following types of creatures: Celestials, Elementals, Fey, Fiends, or Undead. The circle affects a creature of the chosen type in the following ways:

  • The creature can't willingly enter the Cylinder by nonmagical means. If the creature tries to use teleportation or interplanar travel to do so, it must first succeed on a Charisma saving throw.
  • The creature has Disadvantage on attack rolls against targets within the Cylinder.
  • Targets within the Cylinder can't be possessed by or gain the &Reference[charmed apply=false] or &reference[frightened apply=false] condition from the creature.

Each time you cast this spell, you can cause its magic to operate in the reverse direction, preventing a creature of the specified type from leaving the Cylinder and protecting targets outside it.

Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot. The duration increases by 1 hour for each spell slot level above 3.
Magic Circle.materials: salt and powdered silver worth 100+ GP, which the spell consumes

Protection from Poison.name: Protection from Poison
Protection from Poison.description: You touch a creature and end the &Reference[poisoned] condition on it. For the duration, the target has Advantage on saving throws to avoid or end the Poisoned condition, and it has Resistance to Poison damage.

Poison Protection.name: Poison Protection
Poison Protection.description: For the duration, the target has Advantage on saving throws to avoid or end the Poisoned condition, and it has Resistance to Poison damage.

Component Pouch.name: Component Pouch
Component Pouch.description: A Component Pouch is watertight and filled with compartments that hold all the free Material components of your spells.

Healing Word.name: Healing Word
Healing Word.description:
A creature of your choice that you can see within range regains Hit Points equal to 2d4 plus your spellcasting ability modifier.

Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot. The healing increases by 2d4 for each spell slot level above 1.

oNmk6YrrbOdios3l.name: Healing Word
oNmk6YrrbOdios3l.description:
A creature of your choice that you can see within range regains Hit Points equal to 2d4 plus your spellcasting ability modifier.

Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot. The healing increases by 2d4 for each spell slot level above 1.

Greater Star Spawn Emissary.description:
@Embed[Compendium.dnd-ravenloft-horrors-within.book.JournalEntry.rhwBestiary00000.JournalEntryPage.mIP3ftLFnHIoSUSx cite=false caption=false]

Greater Star Spawn Emissary

Star Spawn Emissary Lairs

@Embed[Compendium.dnd-ravenloft-horrors-within.book.JournalEntry.rhwBestiary00000.JournalEntryPage.gJqJZzXp0BXzLnus cite=false caption=false]

Multiattack.name: Multiattack
Multiattack.description: The emissary makes two attacks, using [[/item Lashing Maw]] or [[/item Coagulated Nodule]] in any combination. It can replace one attack with [[/item Unearthly Bile]] if available.

Coagulated Nodule.name: Coagulated Nodule
Coagulated Nodule.description: Ranged Attack Roll: [[/attack]], range 120 ft. Hit: [[/damage average]] damage.
Coagulated Nodule.chat: The emissary creates a corrosive lump of flesh and hurls it toward its target.

Unearthly Bile.name: Unearthly Bile
Unearthly Bile.description:
Dexterity Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=fFSjrvyM6QziuVER]], each creature in a [[lookup @target.template.size activity=fFSjrvyM6QziuVER]]-foot-radius [[lookup @target.template.type capitalize activity=fFSjrvyM6QziuVER]] centered on a point the emissary can see within [[lookup @range.value activity=fFSjrvyM6QziuVER]] feet.

Failure: [[/damage average]] damage, and a @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.actors24.Actor.mmGibberingMouth]{Gibbering Mouther} appears in an unoccupied space within 30 feet of the target. The mouthers take their turn immediately after the emissary on the same Initiative count. Each mouther fights until destroyed.

Success: Half damage only.
Unearthly Bile.chat: The emissary releases a stream of alien bile into the surrounding space.

Forced Mutations.name: Forced Mutations
Forced Mutations.description:
Charisma Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=q0McttlfGJL5mcor]], up to two creatures the emissary can see within [[lookup @range.value activity=q0McttlfGJL5mcor]] feet.

Failure: The target has the &Reference[Paralyzed apply=false] condition until the end of its next turn.

Failure or Success: The emissary can’t take this action again until the start of its next turn.
Forced Mutations.chat: Reality shifts around the creatures chosen by the emissary, making their forms rigid.

Paralyzed.name: Paralyzed
Paralyzed.description: The target has the &Reference[Paralyzed apply=false] condition until the end of its next turn.

Aberrant Restoration.name: Aberrant Restoration
Aberrant Restoration.description: If destroyed, the emissary revives with all its Hit Points in 1 day in the space of a @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.actors24.Actor.mmGibberingMouth]{Gibbering Mouther} that was within 300 feet of the emissary when the emissary was destroyed; that mouther is destroyed.

Cosmic Transformation.name: Cosmic Transformation
Cosmic Transformation.description: When a creature in the lair shape-shifts to its true form, creatures in a [[lookup @target.template.size activity=PobW71zzXO8GZYTa]]-foot Emanation originating from the shape-shifter take [[/damage average]] damage.

Terrifying Topography.name: Terrifying Topography
Terrifying Topography.description: Terrain in the lair is transformed into a mockery of flesh with unsettling features like thick veins, lolling tongues, and pulsating orifices. Creatures of the emissary’s choice within 1 mile of the lair have Disadvantage on saving throws to avoid or end the Frightened condition while in that area.

Teleporting Lash.name: Teleporting Lash
Teleporting Lash.description: The emissary teleports up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space it can see and makes one [[/item Lashing Maw]] attack.
Teleporting Lash.chat: The emissary vanishes and then quickly reappears nearby, striking with its maw.

Legendary Resistance.name: Legendary Resistance
Legendary Resistance.description: If the emissary fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

Lashing Maw.name: Lashing Maw
Lashing Maw.chat: The emissary lunges at a nearby creature, attacking it with its jagged mouth.

Bite (Individual Form Only).name: Bite (Individual Form Only)
Bite (Individual Form Only).chat: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] darts in and bites with a quick, feral snap.

Swarming Bites (Swarm Form Only).name: Swarming Bites (Swarm Form Only)
Swarming Bites (Swarm Form Only).description:
[[/attack extended]]. [[/damage average extended]], or [[/damage average activity=LDdnr5Ljko6AE1Od]] damage if the swarm is Bloodied.

If the target is attuned to any magic items, its Attunement to one item (DM’s choice) ends.
Swarming Bites (Swarm Form Only).chat: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]s swarm around their target, biting from every direction.

Magic Allergy (Individual Form Only).name: Magic Allergy (Individual Form Only)
Magic Allergy (Individual Form Only).description:
Trigger: [[lookup @activation.condition activity=HnwX8wbf6qF7Xgqz]]

Response: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] regains [[/healing]], then becomes a Medium swarm of Tiny creatures.
Magic Allergy (Individual Form Only).chat: The caster's magical energy activates the [[lookup @name lowercase]], causing its body to break apart into numerous smaller forms.

heal.condition: A creature within 30 feet of the gremishka casts a spell.
heal.activationCondition: A creature within 30 feet of the gremishka casts a spell.

Magic Resistance.name: Magic Resistance
Magic Resistance.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

Swarm (Swarm Form Only).name: Swarm (Swarm Form Only)
Swarm (Swarm Form Only).description: The swarm can occupy another creature’s space and vice versa, and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny creature. The swarm can’t regain Hit Points or gain Temporary Hit Points.

Chew.name: Chew
Chew.description:
Dexterity Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=KdxZst6o4oazgjAN]], up to two Medium or smaller creatures Grappled by the [[lookup @name lowercase]].

Failure: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] places the target in its mouth and chews. A chewed creature is no longer Grappled but has the &Reference[Restrained apply=false] condition. While Restrained in this way, a target has &Reference[Half Cover] against attacks and other effects not originating from the [[lookup @name lowercase]] and takes [[/damage average]] damage at the start of each of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]’s turns. A [[lookup @name lowercase]] can have a maximum of four creatures in its mouth at a time.

A creature in the [[lookup @name lowercase]]’s mouth can take an action to make a [[/check format=long]]. On a successful check, the target is no longer Restrained and moves to an unoccupied space within 5 feet of the [[lookup @name lowercase]].

If the [[lookup @name lowercase]] dies, a target is no longer Restrained and can escape from the [[lookup @name lowercase]] using 5 feet of movement, exiting with the &Reference[Prone apply=false] condition.
Chew.chat: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] lifts a creature it is grappling into to its mouth, and bites down.

save.condition: Up to two Medium or smaller creatures Grappled by the gug.
save.activationCondition: Up to two Medium or smaller creatures Grappled by the gug.
save.target: Medium or smaller creatures Grappled by the gug.
save.targetAffects: Medium or smaller creatures Grappled by the gug.

Restrained/Half Cover.name: Restrained/Half Cover
Restrained/Half Cover.description: A chewed creature is no longer Grappled but has the &Reference[Restrained apply=false] condition. While restrained in this way, a target has &Reference[Half Cover] against attacks

Prone.name: Prone
Prone.description: A creature that escapes the mouth of a dead Gug is no longer restrained and can use 5 feet of movement to exit, falling &Reference[Prone apply=false].

Claw.name: Claw
Claw.description:
[[/attack extended]]. [[/damage average extended]].

If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the &Reference[Grappled apply=false] condition (escape DC [[lookup @skills.ath.passive]]) from one of two claws.
Claw.chat: The enormous claw of the [[lookup @name lowercase]] extends out to grasp its target securely.

Grappled.name: Grappled
Grappled.description: The target is &Reference[grappled apply=false] by the creature and can use their action to Escape.

Multiattack.name: Multiattack
Multiattack.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] makes two [[/item Claw]] attacks and uses [[/item Chew]].

Pack Tactics.name: Pack Tactics
Pack Tactics.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] has Advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]'s allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn’t have the Incapacitated condition.
Pack Tactics.requirements: Ally within 5 feet of attack target

Swipe (Dire Wolf or Hybrid Form Only).name: Swipe (Dire Wolf or Hybrid Form Only)
Swipe (Dire Wolf or Hybrid Form Only).description: [[/attack extended]]. [[/damage average extended]]. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the &Reference[Prone apply=false] condition.
Swipe (Dire Wolf or Hybrid Form Only).chat: [[lookup @name]] lashes out with a broad claw swipe aimed to knock the target off balance.

Prone.name: Prone
Prone.description: The target is knocked &Reference[prone apply=false] and can use half of their movement on their turn to stand up.

Multiattack.name: Multiattack
Multiattack.description: [[lookup @name]] makes two [[/item Swipe]] attacks. He can replace one attack with (A) [[/item Bite]] or (B) [[/item Enthralling Performance]].

Enthralling Performance (Humanoid Form O.name: Enthralling Performance (Humanoid Form Only)
Enthralling Performance (Humanoid Form O.description:
Wisdom Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=4MM6OcILSrMcJH5h]], each creature in a [[lookup @target.template.size activity=4MM6OcILSrMcJH5h]]-foot Emanation originating from Harkon.

Failure: The target has the &Reference[Charmed apply=false] condition for 1 hour or until it takes damage.

Crushing Insult.name: Crushing Insult
Crushing Insult.description:
[[lookup @name]] uses [[/item Shape-Shift]] to return to his humanoid form, then uses the following effect.

Wisdom Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=6Jo8xwLG8jx4C1gw]], each creature of [[lookup @name]]’s choice that he can see within [[lookup @target.template.size activity=6Jo8xwLG8jx4C1gw]] feet of himself (creatures Charmed by [[lookup @name]] automatically fail this save).

Failure: [[/damage average]] damage.

Failure or Success: [[lookup @name]] can’t take this action again until the start of his next turn.

Pounce.name: Pounce
Pounce.description: [[lookup @name]] moves up to half his Speed and makes one [[/item Swipe]] attack.

Surprise Bite.name: Surprise Bite
Surprise Bite.description: [[lookup @name]] uses [[/item Shape-Shift]] to turn into his hybrid or dire wolf form and then makes one [[/item Bite]] attack. [[lookup @name]] can’t take this action again until the start of his next turn.

Blood Frenzy.name: Blood Frenzy
Blood Frenzy.description: [[lookup @name]] has Advantage on attack rolls against any creature that doesn’t have all its Hit Points.

Shape-Shift.name: Shape-Shift
Shape-Shift.description:
[[lookup @name]] shape-shifts into a Large dire wolf–humanoid hybrid or a Large @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.actors24.Actor.mmDireWolf000000]{dire wolf}, or he returns to his true humanoid form.

His game statistics, other than his size, are the same in each form. Any equipment he is wearing or carrying isn’t transformed.

Bite (Dire Wolf or Hybrid Form Only).name: Bite (Dire Wolf or Hybrid Form Only)
Bite (Dire Wolf or Hybrid Form Only).description:
[[/attack extended]]. [[/damage average extended]]. If the target is a Humanoid, it is subjected to the following effect:

Constitution Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=IehKJFZIPkj50UpU]].

Failure: The target is cursed. If the cursed target drops to 0 Hit Points, it instead becomes a @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.actors24.Actor.mmWerewolf000000]{Werewolf} under the DM’s control and has 50 Hit Points. The curse can’t be removed until [[lookup @name]] dies.

Success: The target is immune to [[lookup @name]]’s curse for 24 hours.
Bite (Dire Wolf or Hybrid Form Only).chat: [[lookup @name]] darts forward, jaws opening for a quick, savage bite.

Darklord Restoration.name: Darklord Restoration
Darklord Restoration.description: If [[lookup @name]] dies, he revives with all his Hit Points in [[/r 1d10]] weeks somewhere in Kartakass.

Legendary Resistance.name: Legendary Resistance
Legendary Resistance.description: If [[lookup @name]] fails a saving throw, he can choose to succeed instead.

Regeneration.name: Regeneration
Regeneration.description: [[lookup @name]] regains [[lookup @healing.formula activity=5cGvjZJIJVicjJ3d]] Hit Points at the start of each of its turns if it has at least 1 Hit Point.

heal.condition: starts its turn with at least 1 Hit Point
heal.activationCondition: starts its turn with at least 1 Hit Point

Violin.name: Violin
Violin.description:
Ability: Charisma

Utilize: Play a known tune (DC 10), or improvise a song (DC 15)

Spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
Spellcasting.description:
[[lookup @name]] casts one of the following spells, using [[lookup @attributes.spell.abilityLabel]] as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC [[lookup @attributes.spell.dc]]):

At Will: [[/item .sKxNOmLQCh9iO65I]]{Detect Magic}, [[/item .MFC7WOycZiHTLAlU]]{Detect Thoughts}, [[/item .0aMuXrZN0LfEdtVB]]{Disguise Self}, [[/item .ZSogSP5QWMnH5ORf]]{Invisibility}, [[/item .HvEK0mZjWh0K6uNv]]{Light}, [[/item .KvIDYG7fQ3tIoZVx]]{Mage Armor} (included in AC), [[/item .jjeQW5ncr6RXp7NI]]{Mage Hand}, [[/item .PPKZE8JJTXuJXiad]]{Prestidigitation}

1/Day Each: [[/item .tZPPjoWzElt8COIt]]{Cone of Cold}, [[/item .Z6EvZwfzYwj3i3gU]]{Mind Blank} (cast before combat), [[/item .zL7mnYKztHGzrWP8]]{Scrying}, [[/item .YQxuJGqPSwgCacYH]]{Teleport}
Spellcasting.chat: [[lookup @name]] casts a spell in response to the spell’s trigger.

Multiattack.name: Multiattack
Multiattack.description: [[lookup @name]] makes three [[/item Arcane Burst]] attacks.

Arcane Burst.name: Arcane Burst
Arcane Burst.chat: [[lookup @name]] unleashes a concentrated burst of force energy aimed at his target.

Arcane Teleport.name: Arcane Teleport
Arcane Teleport.description: [[lookup @name]] teleports up to [[lookup @range.value activity=XvU04kSzGNl1AHrk]] feet to an unoccupied space he can see, and each creature within [[lookup @target.template.size activity=XvU04kSzGNl1AHrk]] feet of the space he left takes [[/damage average]] damage. Hazlik can’t take this action again until the start of his next turn.
Arcane Teleport.chat: [[lookup @name]] speaks a brief word of magic and disappears, force spreading from the space he left.

Wild Magic Surge.name: Wild Magic Surge
Wild Magic Surge.description:
[[lookup @name]] manifests one of the following magic surges, targeting a creature he can see within [[lookup @range.value activity=RTjZFeAjJG1SuTb2]] feet. While Bloodied, [[lookup @name]] manifests two surges (roll [[/r 1d4]]; reroll if Hazlik has already used that surge during this turn):

  1. Misty Movement. [[lookup @name]] can teleport the target up to [[lookup @range.value activity=w4pseko8cNMUYSug]] feet to an unoccupied space he can see on a surface or liquid large enough to support the target.

  2. Eye Blight. Constitution Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=MRub0leuybc8oWL4]]. Failure: The target has the &Reference[Blinded apply=false] condition until the end of its next turn.

  3. Mind Flare. Intelligence Saving Throw: DC 18. Failure: [[/damage average activity=zybY1eyS6XtyLI8g]] damage, and the target can’t take the Magic action until the end of its next turn.

  4. Implode. Dexterity Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=NrdDR3WgM92YJuAP]]. Failure: The target takes [[/damage average activity=NrdDR3WgM92YJuAP]] damage. Failure or Success: Each creature within [[lookup @target.template.size activity=NrdDR3WgM92YJuAP]] feet of the target takes [[/damage average activity=NrdDR3WgM92YJuAP]] damage.
Wild Magic Surge.chat: With a gesture, Hazlik releases a flare of erratic arcane power toward his chosen target.

Blinded.name: Blinded
Blinded.description: The target has the &Reference[Blinded apply=false] condition until the end of its next turn.

Magic Action Supressed.name: Magic Action Supressed
Magic Action Supressed.description: The target can’t take the Magic action until the end of its next turn.

Protective Magic.name: Protective Magic
Protective Magic.description: [[lookup @name]] casts [[/item .TBSxuIhS50UD1ed8]]{Counterspell} or [[/item .Vg6dLYt04LQpiZrq]]{Shield} in response to the spell’s trigger, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

Darklord Restoration.name: Darklord Restoration
Darklord Restoration.description: If [[lookup @name]] dies, he revives with all his Hit Points in [[/r 1d10]] weeks somewhere in Hazlan.

Magic Resistance.name: Magic Resistance
Magic Resistance.description: [[lookup @name]] has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

Shield.name: Shield
Shield.description: An imperceptible barrier of magical force protects you. Until the start of your next turn, you have a +5 bonus to AC, including against the triggering attack, and you take no damage from @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplMagicMissi]{Magic Missile}.
Shield.activation: when you are hit by an attack roll or targeted by the Magic Missile spell
Shield.activationCondition: when you are hit by an attack roll or targeted by the Magic Missile spell

Imperceptible Barrier.name: Imperceptible Barrier
Imperceptible Barrier.description: Until the start of your next turn, you have a +5 bonus to AC, including against the triggering attack, and you take no damage from Magic Missile.

Counterspell.name: Counterspell
Counterspell.description: You attempt to interrupt a creature in the process of casting a spell. The creature makes a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, the spell dissipates with no effect, and the action, Bonus Action, or Reaction used to cast it is wasted. If that spell was cast with a spell slot, the slot isn't expended.
Counterspell.activation: when you see a creature within range casting a spell with Verbal, Somatic, or Material components
Counterspell.activationCondition: when you see a creature within range casting a spell with Verbal, Somatic, or Material components

Detect Magic.name: Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
For the duration, you sense the presence of magical effects within 30 feet of yourself. If you sense such effects, you can take the Magic action to see a faint aura around any visible creature or object in the area that bears the magic, and if an effect was created by a spell, you learn the spell's school of magic.

The spell is blocked by 1 foot of stone, dirt, or wood; 1 inch of metal; or a thin sheet of lead.

Detect Thoughts.name: Detect Thoughts
Detect Thoughts.description:
You activate one of the effects below. Until the spell ends, you can activate either effect as a Magic action on your later turns.

Sense Thoughts. You sense the presence of thoughts within 30 feet of yourself that belong to creatures that know languages or are telepathic. You don't read the thoughts, but you know that a thinking creature is present.

The spell is blocked by 1 foot of stone, dirt, or wood; 1 inch of metal; or a thin sheet of lead.

Read Thoughts. Target one creature you can see within 30 feet of yourself or one creature within 30 feet of yourself that you detected with the Sense Thoughts option. You learn what is most on the target's mind right now. If the target doesn't know any languages and isn't telepathic, you learn nothing.

As a Magic action on your next turn, you can try to probe deeper into the target's mind. If you probe deeper, the target makes a Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, you discern the target's reasoning, emotions, and something that looms large in its mind (such as a worry, love, or hate). On a successful save, the spell ends. Either way, the target knows that you are probing into its mind, and until you shift your attention away from the target's mind, the target can take an action on its turn to make an [[/check ability=int skill=arc dc=@attributes.spell.dc]] check against your spell save DC, ending the spell on a success.

Disguise Self.name: Disguise Self
Disguise Self.description:
You make yourself—including your clothing, armor, weapons, and other belongings on your person—look different until the spell ends. You can seem 1 foot shorter or taller and can appear heavier or lighter. You must adopt a form that has the same basic arrangement of limbs as you have. Otherwise, the extent of the illusion is up to you.

The changes wrought by this spell fail to hold up to physical inspection. For example, if you use this spell to add a hat to your outfit, objects pass through the hat, and anyone who touches it would feel nothing.

To discern that you are disguised, a creature must take the Study action to inspect your appearance and succeed on an [[/check ability=int skill=inv dc=@attributes.spell.dc]] check against your spell save DC.

Disguised.name: Disguised
Disguised.description: To discern that you are disguised, a creature must take the Study action to inspect your appearance and succeed on an [[/check ability=int skill=inv]] check against your spell save DC.

Invisibility.name: Invisibility
Invisibility.description:
A creature you touch has the &Reference[invisible apply=false] condition until the spell ends. The spell ends early immediately after the target makes an attack roll, deals damage, or casts a spell.

Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot. You can target one additional creature for each spell slot level above 2.

Invisible.name: Invisible
Invisible.description: The spell ends early immediately after the target makes an attack roll, deals damage, or casts a spell.

Light.name: Light
Light.description:
You touch one Large or smaller object that isn't being worn or carried by someone else. Until the spell ends, the object sheds Bright Light in a 20-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 20 feet. The light can be colored as you like.

Covering the object with something opaque blocks the light. The spell ends if you cast it again.

Prestidigitation.name: Prestidigitation
Prestidigitation.description:
You create a magical effect within range. Choose the effect from the options below. If you cast this spell multiple times, you can have up to three of its non-instantaneous effects active at a time.

Sensory Effect. You create an instantaneous, harmless sensory effect, such as a shower of sparks, a puff of wind, faint musical notes, or an odd odor.

Fire Play. You instantaneously light or snuff out a candle, a torch, or a small campfire.

Clean or Soil. You instantaneously clean or soil an object no larger than 1 cubic foot.

Minor Sensation. You chill, warm, or flavor up to 1 cubic foot of nonliving material for 1 hour.

Magic Mark. You make a color, a small mark, or a symbol appear on an object or a surface for 1 hour.

Minor Creation. You create a nonmagical trinket or an illusory image that can fit in your hand. It lasts until the end of your next turn. A trinket can deal no damage and has no monetary worth.

Mage Hand.name: Mage Hand
Mage Hand.description:
A spectral, floating hand appears at a point you choose within range. The hand lasts for the duration. The hand vanishes if it is ever more than 30 feet away from you or if you cast this spell again.

When you cast the spell, you can use the hand to manipulate an object, open an unlocked door or container, stow or retrieve an item from an open container, or pour the contents out of a vial.

As a Magic action on your later turns, you can control the hand thus again. As part of that action, you can move the hand up to 30 feet.

The hand can't attack, activate magic items, or carry more than 10 pounds.

Fly.name: Fly
Fly.description:
You touch a willing creature. For the duration, the target gains a Fly Speed of 60 feet and can hover. When the spell ends, the target falls if it is still aloft unless it can stop the fall.

Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot. You can target one additional creature for each spell slot level above 3.

Mage Armor.name: Mage Armor
Mage Armor.description: You touch a willing creature who isn't wearing armor. Until the spell ends, the target's base AC becomes 13 plus its Dexterity modifier. The spell ends early if the target dons armor.

Mage Armor.name: Mage Armor
Mage Armor.description: The target's base AC becomes 13 + its Dexterity modifier.

Mind Blank.name: Mind Blank
Mind Blank.description: Until the spell ends, one willing creature you touch has Immunity to Psychic damage and the Charmed condition. The target is also unaffected by anything that would sense its emotions or alignment, read its thoughts, or magically detect its location, and no spell—not even @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplWish000000]{Wish}—can gather information about the target, observe it remotely, or control its mind.

Cone of Cold.name: Cone of Cold
Cone of Cold.description:
You unleash a blast of cold air. Each creature in a 60-foot Cone originating from you makes a Constitution saving throw, taking 8d8 Cold damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one. A creature killed by this spell becomes a frozen statue until it thaws.

Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot. The damage increases by 1d8 for each spell slot level above 5.
Cone of Cold.materials: a small crystal or glass cone

Lightning Bolt.name: Lightning Bolt
Lightning Bolt.description:
A stroke of lightning forming a 100-foot-long, 5-foot-wide Line blasts out from you in a direction you choose. Each creature in the Line makes a Dexterity saving throw, taking 8d6 Lightning damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one.

Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot. The damage increases by 1d6 for each spell slot level above 3.
Lightning Bolt.materials: a bit of fur and a crystal rod

Teleport.name: Teleport
Teleport.description:
This spell instantly transports you and up to eight willing creatures that you can see within range, or a single object that you can see within range, to a destination you select. If you target an object, it must be Large or smaller, and it can't be held or carried by an unwilling creature.

The destination you choose must be known to you, and it must be on the same plane of existence as you. Your familiarity with the destination determines whether you arrive there successfully. The DM rolls [[/gmr 1d100]] and consults the Teleportation Outcome table and the explanations after it.

@UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.tables24.RollTable.phbsplTeleportMi]{Teleportation Outcome}
FamiliarityMishapSimilar AreaOff TargetOn Target
Permanent circle———01–00
Linked object———01–00
Very familiar01–0506–1314–2425–00
Seen casually01–3334–4344–5354–00
Viewed once or described01–4344–5354–7374–00
False destination01–5051–00——

Familiarity. Here are the meanings of the terms in the table's Familiarity column:

  • "Permanent circle" means a permanent teleportation circle whose sigil sequence you know.
  • "Linked object" means you possess an object taken from the desired destination within the last six months, such as a book from a wizard's library.
  • "Very familiar" is a place you have visited often, a place you have carefully studied, or a place you can see when you cast the spell.
  • "Seen casually" is a place you have seen more than once but with which you aren't very familiar.
  • "Viewed once or described" is a place you have seen once, possibly using magic, or a place you know through someone else's description, perhaps from a map.
  • "False destination" is a place that doesn't exist. Perhaps you tried to scry an enemy's sanctum but instead viewed an illusion, or you are attempting to teleport to a location that no longer exists.

Mishap. The spell's unpredictable magic results in a difficult journey. Each teleporting creature (or the target object) takes [[/damage 3d10 type=force]] damage, and the DM rerolls on the table to see where you wind up (multiple mishaps can occur, dealing damage each time).

Similar Area. You and your group (or the target object) appear in a different area that's visually or thematically similar to the target area. You appear in the closest similar place. If you are heading for your home laboratory, for example, you might appear in another person's laboratory in the same city.

Off Target. You and your group (or the target object) appear [[/r 2d12]] miles away from the destination in a random direction. Roll [[/r 1d8]] for the direction: 1, east; 2, southeast; 3, south; 4, southwest; 5, west; 6, northwest; 7, north; or 8, northeast.

On Target. You and your group (or the target object) appear where you intended.
Teleport.targetAffects: you and up to eight creatures or one object

Scrying.name: Scrying
Scrying.description:
You can see and hear a creature you choose that is on the same plane of existence as you. The target makes a Wisdom saving throw, which is modified (see the tables below) by how well you know the target and the sort of physical connection you have to it. The target doesn't know what it is making the save against, only that it feels uneasy.

Your Knowledge of the Target Is …Save Modifier
Secondhand (heard of the target)+5
Firsthand (met the target)+0
Extensive (know the target well)−5
You Have the Target's …Save Modifier
Picture or other likeness−2
Garment or other possession−4
Body part, lock of hair, or bit of nail−10

On a successful save, the target isn't affected, and you can't use this spell on it again for 24 hours.

On a failed save, the spell creates an Invisible, intangible sensor within 10 feet of the target. You can see and hear through the sensor as if you were there. The sensor moves with the target, remaining within 10 feet of it for the duration. If something can see the sensor, it appears as a luminous orb about the size of your fist.

Instead of targeting a creature, you can target a location you have seen. When you do so, the sensor appears at that location and doesn't move.
Scrying.materials: a focus worth 1,000+ GP, such as a crystal ball, mirror, or water-filled font
Scrying.targetAffects: creature on same plane of existence or a location you have seen

Create Sensor.name: Create Sensor
Create Sensor.target: at target location or within 10 feet of target creature
Create Sensor.targetAffects: at target location or within 10 feet of target creature

Legendary Resistance.name: Legendary Resistance
Legendary Resistance.description: If [[lookup @name]] fails a saving throw, he can choose to succeed instead.

Quarterstaff.name: Quarterstaff
Quarterstaff.description: [[/attack extended]]. [[/damage average extended]]  or [[/damage twoHanded average]] damage if used with two hands.

VjqG6GXESj0EnCjF.name: Counterspell
VjqG6GXESj0EnCjF.description: You attempt to interrupt a creature in the process of casting a spell. The creature makes a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, the spell dissipates with no effect, and the action, Bonus Action, or Reaction used to cast it is wasted. If that spell was cast with a spell slot, the slot isn't expended.
VjqG6GXESj0EnCjF.activation: when you see a creature within range casting a spell with Verbal, Somatic, or Material components
VjqG6GXESj0EnCjF.activationCondition: when you see a creature within range casting a spell with Verbal, Somatic, or Material components

5LtOMBQQNNBHw9e0.name: Shield
5LtOMBQQNNBHw9e0.description: An imperceptible barrier of magical force protects you. Until the start of your next turn, you have a +5 bonus to AC, including against the triggering attack, and you take no damage from @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplMagicMissi]{Magic Missile}.
5LtOMBQQNNBHw9e0.activation: when you are hit by an attack roll or targeted by the Magic Missile spell
5LtOMBQQNNBHw9e0.activationCondition: when you are hit by an attack roll or targeted by the Magic Missile spell

Imperceptible Barrier.name: Imperceptible Barrier
Imperceptible Barrier.description: Until the start of your next turn, you have a +5 bonus to AC, including against the triggering attack, and you take no damage from Magic Missile.

Inquisitor of the Mind Fire.name: Inquisitor of the Mind Fire
Inquisitor of the Mind Fire.description:
@Embed[Compendium.dnd-ravenloft-horrors-within.book.JournalEntry.rhwBestiary00000.JournalEntryPage.2BJihv7XGy555cfE cite=false caption=false]

Inquisitor of the Mind Fire

@Embed[Compendium.dnd-ravenloft-horrors-within.book.JournalEntry.rhwBestiary00000.JournalEntryPage.4HyhyrKWodmmj5of cite=false caption=false]

Multiattack.name: Multiattack
Multiattack.description: The inquisitor makes three [[/item Silvered Longsword]] attacks or uses [[/item Mind Fire]] three times. It can replace one attack or one use of Mind Fire with a use of [[/item Spellcasting]] to cast [[/item .UeDNI7uqeO3sTX6r]]{Hold Monster} if available.

Spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
Spellcasting.description:
The inquisitor casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using [[lookup @attributes.spell.abilityLabel]] as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC [[lookup @attributes.spell.dc]]):

At Will: [[/item .hqVEsbpyjNcnFVoi]]{Detect Magic}, [[/item .BC55QFGsmcem59xQ]]{Detect Thoughts}, [[/item .lzOAQ5HxsHhrwiwR]]{Dispel Magic}, [[/item .gpacwXxFvpvmes09]]{Mage Hand} (the hand is Invisible), [[/item .F8iyDXWIfB9idp5p]]{Sending}

1/Day Each: [[/item .UeDNI7uqeO3sTX6r]]{Hold Monster}, [[/item .0h6IiXQo1a3QhKoB]]{Modify Memory}

Silvered Longsword.name: Silvered Longsword
Silvered Longsword.description:
[[/attack extended]]. [[/damage average extended]], and the target has the &Reference[Frightened apply=false] condition until the start of the inquisitor’s next turn.

Critical Hit: If the target is a shape-shifted creature, it takes an additional 4 ([[/r 1d8]]) Slashing damage.
Silvered Longsword.chat: The inquisitor positions itself and strikes its target with a deliberate swing.

Additional Damage on Crit.name: Additional Damage on Crit
Additional Damage on Crit.condition: If the target is a shape-shifted creature
Additional Damage on Crit.activationCondition: If the target is a shape-shifted creature

Frightened.name: Frightened
Frightened.description: The target has the &Reference[Frightened apply=false] condition until the start of the inquisitor’s next turn.

Mind Fire.name: Mind Fire
Mind Fire.description:
Intelligence Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=rNHJ2zvkVKgJBcNQ]], one creature the inquisitor can see within [[lookup @range.value activity=rNHJ2zvkVKgJBcNQ]] feet.

Failure: [[/damage average]] damage, and the target has the &Reference[Stunned apply=false] condition until the start of the inquisitor’s next turn.
Mind Fire.chat: The inquisitor injects a surge of dark thoughts into the target's mind.

Stunned.name: Stunned
Stunned.description: The target has the &Reference[Stunned apply=false] condition until the start of the inquisitor’s next turn.

Breastplate.name: Breastplate
Breastplate.description: This armor consists of a fitted metal chest piece worn with supple leather. Although it leaves the legs and arms relatively unprotected, this armor provides good protection for the wearer's vital organs while leaving the wearer relatively unencumbered.

Inquisitor’s Command.name: Inquisitor’s Command
Inquisitor’s Command.description:
Wisdom Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=PKYI5vlw7SfHplxm]], each creature of the inquisitor’s choice that it can see within [[lookup @range.value activity=PKYI5vlw7SfHplxm]] feet.

Failure: The target has the &Reference[Charmed apply=false] condition until the start of the inquisitor’s next turn. On the Charmed target’s turn, the inquisitor can telepathically control the target’s move and make the target take the Attack action (the inquisitor chooses the target), the &Reference[Dash] action, or no action.
Inquisitor’s Command.chat: The inquisitor raises a hand and commands those nearby mentally.

Charmed.name: Charmed
Charmed.description:
The target has the &Reference[Charmed apply=false] condition until the start of the inquisitor’s next turn.

On the Charmed target’s turn, the inquisitor can telepathically control the target’s move and make the target take the Attack action (the inquisitor chooses the target), the &Reference[Dash] action, or no action.

Detect Magic.name: Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
For the duration, you sense the presence of magical effects within 30 feet of yourself. If you sense such effects, you can take the Magic action to see a faint aura around any visible creature or object in the area that bears the magic, and if an effect was created by a spell, you learn the spell's school of magic.

The spell is blocked by 1 foot of stone, dirt, or wood; 1 inch of metal; or a thin sheet of lead.

Mage Hand.name: Mage Hand
Mage Hand.description:
A spectral, floating hand appears at a point you choose within range. The hand lasts for the duration. The hand vanishes if it is ever more than 30 feet away from you or if you cast this spell again.

When you cast the spell, you can use the hand to manipulate an object, open an unlocked door or container, stow or retrieve an item from an open container, or pour the contents out of a vial.

As a Magic action on your later turns, you can control the hand thus again. As part of that action, you can move the hand up to 30 feet.

The hand can't attack, activate magic items, or carry more than 10 pounds.

Sending.name: Sending
Sending.description:
You send a short message of 25 words or fewer to a creature you have met or a creature described to you by someone who has met it. The target hears the message in its mind, recognizes you as the sender if it knows you, and can answer in a like manner immediately. The spell enables targets to understand the meaning of your message.

You can send the message across any distance and even to other planes of existence, but if the target is on a different plane than you, there is a 5 percent chance that the message doesn't arrive. You know if the delivery fails.

Upon receiving your message, a creature can block your ability to reach it again with this spell for 8 hours. If you try to send another message during that time, you learn that you are blocked, and the spell fails.

Hold Monster.name: Hold Monster
Hold Monster.description:
Choose a creature that you can see within range. The target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or have the Paralyzed condition for the duration. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save, ending the spell on itself on a success.

Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot. You can target one additional creature for each spell slot level above 5.

Paralyzed.name: Paralyzed
Paralyzed.description: At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the [[/save ability=wis]] save, ending the spell on itself on a success.

Modify Memory.name: Modify Memory
Modify Memory.description:
You attempt to reshape another creature's memories. One creature that you can see within range makes a Wisdom saving throw. If you are fighting the creature, it has Advantage on the save. On a failed save, the target has the &Reference[Charmed apply=false] condition for the duration. While Charmed in this way, the target also has the &Reference[Incapacitated apply=false] condition and is unaware of its surroundings, though it can hear you. If it takes any damage or is targeted by another spell, this spell ends, and no memories are modified.

While this charm lasts, you can affect the target's memory of an event that it experienced within the last 24 hours and that lasted no more than 10 minutes. You can permanently eliminate all memory of the event, allow the target to recall the event with perfect clarity, change its memory of the event's details, or create a memory of some other event.

You must speak to the target to describe how its memories are affected, and it must be able to understand your language for the modified memories to take root. Its mind fills in any gaps in the details of your description. If the spell ends before you finish describing the modified memories, the creature's memory isn't altered. Otherwise, the modified memories take hold when the spell ends.

A modified memory doesn't necessarily affect how a creature behaves, particularly if the memory contradicts the creature's natural inclinations, alignment, or beliefs. An illogical modified memory, such as a false memory of how much the creature enjoyed swimming in acid, is dismissed as a bad dream. The DM might deem a modified memory too nonsensical to affect a creature.

A @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplRemoveCurs]{Remove Curse} or @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplGreaterRes]{Greater Restoration} spell cast on the target restores the creature's true memory.

Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot. You can alter the target's memories of an event that took place up to 7 days ago (level 6 spell slot), 30 days ago (level 7 spell slot), 365 days ago (level 8 spell slot), or any time in the creature's past (level 9 spell slot).

Memory Modification.name: Memory Modification
Memory Modification.description: While &Reference[Charmed apply=false] in this way, the target also has the &Reference[Incapacitated apply=false] condition and is unaware of its surroundings, though it can hear you. If it takes any damage or is targeted by another spell, this spell ends, and no memories are modified.

Detect Thoughts.name: Detect Thoughts
Detect Thoughts.description:
You activate one of the effects below. Until the spell ends, you can activate either effect as a Magic action on your later turns.

Sense Thoughts. You sense the presence of thoughts within 30 feet of yourself that belong to creatures that know languages or are telepathic. You don't read the thoughts, but you know that a thinking creature is present.

The spell is blocked by 1 foot of stone, dirt, or wood; 1 inch of metal; or a thin sheet of lead.

Read Thoughts. Target one creature you can see within 30 feet of yourself or one creature within 30 feet of yourself that you detected with the Sense Thoughts option. You learn what is most on the target's mind right now. If the target doesn't know any languages and isn't telepathic, you learn nothing.

As a Magic action on your next turn, you can try to probe deeper into the target's mind. If you probe deeper, the target makes a Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, you discern the target's reasoning, emotions, and something that looms large in its mind (such as a worry, love, or hate). On a successful save, the spell ends. Either way, the target knows that you are probing into its mind, and until you shift your attention away from the target's mind, the target can take an action on its turn to make an [[/check ability=int skill=arc dc=@attributes.spell.dc]] check against your spell save DC, ending the spell on a success.

Dispel Magic.name: Dispel Magic
Dispel Magic.description:
Choose one creature, object, or magical effect within range. Any ongoing spell of level 3 or lower on the target ends. For each ongoing spell of level 4 or higher on the target, make an ability check using your spellcasting ability (DC 10 plus that spell's level). On a successful check, the spell ends.

Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot. You automatically end a spell on the target if the spell's level is equal to or less than the level of the spell slot you use.

Inquisitor of the Sword.description:

You can also teleport one willing creature. The creature must be within 5 feet of you when you teleport, and it teleports to a space within 5 feet of your destination space.

If you, the other creature, or both would arrive in a space occupied by a creature or completely filled by one or more objects, you and any creature traveling with you each take 4d6 Force damage, and the teleportation fails.

Critical Hit: If the target is a shape-shifted creature, it takes an additional 4 ([[/r 1d8]]) Slashing damage.

Hit or Miss: The inquisitor can teleport up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space it can see.
Silvered Longsword.chat: The inquisitor positions itself and strikes its target with a deliberate swing.

Additional Damage on Crit.name: Additional Damage on Crit
Additional Damage on Crit.condition: If the target is a shape-shifted creature
Additional Damage on Crit.activationCondition: If the target is a shape-shifted creature

Frightened.name: Frightened
Frightened.description: The target has the &Reference[Frightened apply=false] condition until the start of the inquisitor’s next turn.

Inquisitor of the Tome.name: Inquisitor of the Tome
Inquisitor of the Tome.description:
@Embed[Compendium.dnd-ravenloft-horrors-within.book.JournalEntry.rhwBestiary00000.JournalEntryPage.2BJihv7XGy555cfE cite=false caption=false]

Inquisitor of the Tome

@Embed[Compendium.dnd-ravenloft-horrors-within.book.JournalEntry.rhwBestiary00000.JournalEntryPage.48IzPpN8BbSYIe5Z cite=false caption=false]

Spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
Spellcasting.description:
The inquisitor casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using [[lookup @attributes.spell.abilityLabel]] as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC [[lookup @attributes.spell.dc]]):

At Will: [[/item .jK4H3fsSCRiyfKTc]]{Detect Magic}, [[/item .XObtRhxwUHUBWWjL]]{Dispel Magic}, [[/item .eCeRn8O8WZzWPBJS]]{Mage Armor}, [[/item .2excWuGtqDS5ZvK8]]{Mage Hand}, [[/item .2i7miILGUDiCkZhf]]{Sending}

1/Day Each: [[/item .dG2mkHjkTDu9nBfi]]{Resilient Sphere}, [[/item .6YnIJ8RAgRTTm0vu]]{Telekinesis}

Multiattack.name: Multiattack
Multiattack.description: The inquisitor makes three [[/item Force Blade]] attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of [[/item Spellcasting]] to cast [[/item .dG2mkHjkTDu9nBfi]]{Otiluke's Resilient Sphere} or [[/item .6YnIJ8RAgRTTm0vu]]{Telekinesis} if available.

Force Blade.name: Force Blade
Force Blade.description: [[/attack extended]]. [[/damage average extended]]. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it is pushed up to 10 feet straight away from the inquisitor.
Force Blade.chat: The inquisitor directs a blade of force towards the target.

Implode.name: Implode
Implode.description:
Dexterity Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=hpXkmSfmQhdCStlR]], each creature in a [[lookup @target.template.size activity=hpXkmSfmQhdCStlR]]-foot-radius [[lookup @target.template.type capitalize activity=hpXkmSfmQhdCStlR]] centered on a point the inquisitor can see within [[lookup @range.value activity=hpXkmSfmQhdCStlR]] feet.

Failure: [[/damage average]] damage, and the target has the &Reference[Prone apply=false] condition and is pulled up to 20 feet straight toward the Sphere’s center.

Success: Half damage only.
Implode.chat: The inquisitor focuses on a distant point in order to harness energy from that location.

Longsword.name: Longsword
Longsword.description: [[/attack extended]]. [[/damage average extended]]  or [[/damage twoHanded average]] damage if used with two hands.

Detect Magic.name: Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
For the duration, you sense the presence of magical effects within 30 feet of yourself. If you sense such effects, you can take the Magic action to see a faint aura around any visible creature or object in the area that bears the magic, and if an effect was created by a spell, you learn the spell's school of magic.

The spell is blocked by 1 foot of stone, dirt, or wood; 1 inch of metal; or a thin sheet of lead.

Dispel Magic.name: Dispel Magic
Dispel Magic.description:
Choose one creature, object, or magical effect within range. Any ongoing spell of level 3 or lower on the target ends. For each ongoing spell of level 4 or higher on the target, make an ability check using your spellcasting ability (DC 10 plus that spell's level). On a successful check, the spell ends.

Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot. You automatically end a spell on the target if the spell's level is equal to or less than the level of the spell slot you use.

Mage Hand.name: Mage Hand
Mage Hand.description:
A spectral, floating hand appears at a point you choose within range. The hand lasts for the duration. The hand vanishes if it is ever more than 30 feet away from you or if you cast this spell again.

When you cast the spell, you can use the hand to manipulate an object, open an unlocked door or container, stow or retrieve an item from an open container, or pour the contents out of a vial.

As a Magic action on your later turns, you can control the hand thus again. As part of that action, you can move the hand up to 30 feet.

The hand can't attack, activate magic items, or carry more than 10 pounds.

Mage Armor.name: Mage Armor
Mage Armor.description: You touch a willing creature who isn't wearing armor. Until the spell ends, the target's base AC becomes 13 plus its Dexterity modifier. The spell ends early if the target dons armor.

Mage Armor.name: Mage Armor
Mage Armor.description: The target's base AC becomes 13 + its Dexterity modifier.

Sending.name: Sending
Sending.description:
You send a short message of 25 words or fewer to a creature you have met or a creature described to you by someone who has met it. The target hears the message in its mind, recognizes you as the sender if it knows you, and can answer in a like manner immediately. The spell enables targets to understand the meaning of your message.

You can send the message across any distance and even to other planes of existence, but if the target is on a different plane than you, there is a 5 percent chance that the message doesn't arrive. You know if the delivery fails.

Upon receiving your message, a creature can block your ability to reach it again with this spell for 8 hours. If you try to send another message during that time, you learn that you are blocked, and the spell fails.

Resilient Sphere.name: Resilient Sphere
Resilient Sphere.description:
A shimmering sphere encloses a Large or smaller creature or object within range. An unwilling creature must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or be enclosed for the duration.

Nothing—not physical objects, energy, or other spell effects—can pass through the barrier, in or out, though a creature in the sphere can breathe there. The sphere is immune to all damage, and a creature or object inside can't be damaged by attacks or effects originating from outside, nor can a creature inside the sphere damage anything outside it.

The sphere is weightless and just large enough to contain the creature or object inside. An enclosed creature can take an action to push against the sphere's walls and thus roll the sphere at up to half the creature's Speed. Similarly, the globe can be picked up and moved by other creatures.

A @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDisintegra]{Disintegrate} spell targeting the globe destroys it without harming anything inside.

Enclosed in Sphere.name: Enclosed in Sphere
Enclosed in Sphere.description: An enclosed creature can take an action to push against the sphere’s walls and thus roll the sphere at up to half the creature’s Speed.

Telekinesis.name: Telekinesis
Telekinesis.description:
You gain the ability to move or manipulate creatures or objects by thought. When you cast the spell and as a Magic action on your later turns before the spell ends, you can exert your will on one creature or object that you can see within range, causing the appropriate effect below. You can affect the same target round after round or choose a new one at any time. If you switch targets, the prior target is no longer affected by the spell.

Creature. You can try to move a Huge or smaller creature. The target must succeed on a Strength saving throw, or you move it up to 30 feet in any direction within the spell's range. Until the end of your next turn, the creature has the &Reference[Restrained] condition, and if you lift it into the air, it is suspended there. It falls at the end of your next turn unless you use this option on it again and it fails the save.

Object. You can try to move a Huge or smaller object. If the object isn't being worn or carried, you automatically move it up to 30 feet in any direction within the spell's range.

If the object is worn or carried by a creature, that creature must succeed on a Strength saving throw, or you pull the object away and move it up to 30 feet in any direction within the spell's range.

You can exert fine control on objects with your telekinetic grip, such as manipulating a simple tool, opening a door or a container, stowing or retrieving an item from an open container, or pouring the contents from a vial.

Ivan Dilisnya.name: Ivan Dilisnya
Ivan Dilisnya.description:
@Embed[Compendium.dnd-ravenloft-horrors-within.book.JournalEntry.rhwBorca00000000.JournalEntryPage.IvanDilisnyaBZ4D cite=false caption=false]

Ivana and Ivan’s Domain

@Embed[Compendium.dnd-ravenloft-horrors-within.book.JournalEntry.rhwBorca00000000.JournalEntryPage.IvanaandIvansDSp cite=false caption=false]

Multiattack.name: Multiattack
Multiattack.description: [[lookup @name]] makes two [[/item Foreleg]] attacks. He can replace one attack with a use of [[/item Deadly Contraption]].

Foreleg.name: Foreleg
Foreleg.chat: With cruel, insectile speed, the machine’s foreleg lashes out and pierces the target.

Deadly Contraption.name: Deadly Contraption
Deadly Contraption.description:
Dexterity Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=clp8l1sY1eCsU9FA]], one creature [[lookup @name]] can see within [[lookup @range.value activity=clp8l1sY1eCsU9FA]] feet.

Failure: [[/damage average activity=clp8l1sY1eCsU9FA]] damage.

Failure or Success: A flailing clockwork contraption attaches to the target until the start of [[lookup @name]]’s next turn. If the target willingly moves 5 feet or more before then, the target takes [[/damage average activity=0C0jsxkYopdxtG9M]] damage.

At the start of [[lookup @name]]’s next turn, the device crumbles to dust and vanishes.
Deadly Contraption.chat: A whirring clockwork device latches onto the target, slashing at them if they try to move.

Trapped Ground.name: Trapped Ground
Trapped Ground.description:
[[lookup @name]] spreads special caltrops to cover a [[lookup @target.template.size activity=RwkRTXEAqjEYniQc]]-foot-square area within [[lookup @range.value activity=RwkRTXEAqjEYniQc]] feet of himself. The caltrops dissolve at the end of [[lookup @name]]’s next turn. Ivan can’t take this action again until the start of his next turn.

When the caltrops appear, each creature in the area is subjected to the following effect; a creature that enters the caltrops for the first time on a turn or ends its turn there is also subjected to this effect.

Dexterity Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=RwkRTXEAqjEYniQc]] (a creature makes this save only once per turn).

Failure: [[/damage average]] damage, and its Speed is reduced to 0 until the start of its next turn.
Trapped Ground.chat: Ivan scatters caltrops, turning the ground into a cruel bed of spikes.

Speed 0 ft..name: Speed 0 ft.
Speed 0 ft..description: The target's Speed is reduced to 0 until the start of its next turn.

Darklord Restoration.name: Darklord Restoration
Darklord Restoration.description: If [[lookup @name]] dies, he revives with all his Hit Points in [[/r 1d10]] weeks somewhere in Borca.

Legendary Resistance.name: Legendary Resistance
Legendary Resistance.description: If [[lookup @name]] fails a saving throw, he can choose to succeed instead.

Ivana Boritsi.name: Ivana Boritsi
Ivana Boritsi.description:
@Embed[Compendium.dnd-ravenloft-horrors-within.book.JournalEntry.rhwBorca00000000.JournalEntryPage.IvanaBoritsiEkdn cite=false caption=false]

Ivana and Ivan’s Domain

@Embed[Compendium.dnd-ravenloft-horrors-within.book.JournalEntry.rhwBorca00000000.JournalEntryPage.IvanaandIvansDSp cite=false caption=false]

Multiattack.name: Multiattack
Multiattack.description: [[lookup @name]] makes two [[/item Toxic Touch]] attacks.

Toxic Touch.name: Toxic Touch
Toxic Touch.description:
[[/attack extended]]. [[/damage average extended]].

A Humanoid reduced to 0 Hit Points by this damage rises 24 hours later as a @UUID[Compendium.dnd-monster-manual.actors.Actor.mmVineBlight0000]{Vine Blight} (see Monster Manual) under [[lookup @name]]’s control unless the Humanoid is restored to life or its body is destroyed.
Toxic Touch.chat: With a light touch, [[lookup @name]] injects the target with a deadly toxin.

Stifling Perfume.name: Stifling Perfume
Stifling Perfume.description:
Constitution Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=00IVSmDILiTDIMDn]], each creature in a [[lookup @target.template.size activity=00IVSmDILiTDIMDn]]-foot Emanation originating from [[lookup @name]].

Failure: [[/damage average]] damage, and the target has the &Reference[Prone apply=false] condition.

Success: Half damage only.
Stifling Perfume.chat: [[lookup @name]] fills the air with a toxic perfume.

Prone.name: Prone
Prone.description: The target is knocked &Reference[prone apply=false], and can use half of their movement on their turn to stand up.

Toxin Wave.name: Toxin Wave
Toxin Wave.description:
Dexterity Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=2xJ3Rh7FVLTXDYXY]], each creature in a [[lookup @target.template.size activity=2xJ3Rh7FVLTXDYXY]]-foot Cone.

Failure: The target has the &Reference[Poisoned apply=false] condition until the end of its next turn. While Poisoned, the target subtracts [[/r 1d6]] from its damage rolls.

Failure or Success: [[lookup @name]] can’t take this action again until the start of her next turn.
Toxin Wave.chat: [[lookup @name]] releases a focused wave of toxin before her.

Poisoned.name: Poisoned
Poisoned.description: The target has the &Reference[Poisoned apply=false] condition until the end of its next turn

Darklord Restoration.name: Darklord Restoration
Darklord Restoration.description: If [[lookup @name]] dies, she revives with all her Hit Points in [[/r 1d10]] weeks somewhere in Borca.

Legendary Resistance.name: Legendary Resistance
Legendary Resistance.description: If [[lookup @name]] fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

Charm.name: Charm
Charm.description: [[lookup @name]] casts [[/item .fCSdkEt9w2RudqHG]]{Charm Person}, requiring no spell components and using [[lookup @attributes.spell.abilityLabel]] as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC [[lookup @attributes.spell.dc]]), and the duration is 24 hours.
Charm.chat: [[lookup @name]] speaks with quiet authority, and her target’s resistance begins to fade.

Charm Person.name: Charm Person
Charm Person.description:
One Humanoid you can see within range makes a Wisdom saving throw. It does so with Advantage if you or your allies are fighting it. On a failed save, the target has the &Reference[charmed apply=false] condition until the spell ends or until you or your allies damage it. The Charmed creature is Friendly to you. When the spell ends, the target knows it was Charmed by you.

Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot. You can target one additional creature for each spell slot level above 1.

Charmed.name: Charmed
Charmed.description: the target has the &Reference[charmed apply=false] condition until the spell ends or until you or your allies damage it. The Charmed creature is Friendly to you. When the spell ends, the target knows it was Charmed by you.

Tree Stride.name: Tree Stride
Tree Stride.description: If within 5 feet of a Large or bigger inanimate plant, [[lookup @name]] teleports to an unoccupied space within 5 feet of a second Large or bigger inanimate plant that is within [[lookup @range.value activity=T8Unuj2xbTEALAga]] feet of the previous plant.
Tree Stride.chat: [[lookup @name]] steps toward the nearby plant, her form beginning to slip into its shadow.

Slam.name: Slam
Slam.description: Melee Attack Roll: [[/attack]], reach 5 ft. Hit: [[/damage average]] damage.

Multiattack.name: Multiattack
Multiattack.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] makes three [[/item Slam]] attacks and uses [[/item Consume Energy]].

Consume Energy.name: Consume Energy
Consume Energy.description:
Constitution Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=vqUPNibCkXperEoA]], one creature the [[lookup @name lowercase]] can see within [[lookup @range.value activity=vqUPNibCkXperEoA]] feet.

Failure: [[/damage average]] damage.

Success: Half damage.

Failure or Success: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] regains Hit Points equal to the Necrotic damage taken, the [[lookup @name lowercase]]’s Fly Speed increases to 20 feet until the end of its next turn, and it can take its [[/item Hungering Stride]] Bonus Action.

A Humanoid reduced to 0 Hit Points by this damage rises at the end of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]’s turn as a @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.actors24.Actor.mmWight000000000]{Wight} under the [[lookup @name lowercase]]’s control. If this wight kills a Humanoid with its Life Drain action, the wight transforms into an independent @UUID[Compendium.dnd-ravenloft-horrors-within.actors.Actor.rhwJiangshi00000]{Jiangshi} 5 days later.
Consume Energy.chat: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] focuses on a single creature, attempting to drain its life.

Fly Speed +20.name: Fly Speed +20
Fly Speed +20.description: The jiangshi’s Fly Speed increases to 20 feet until the end of its next turn.

Shape-Shift.name: Shape-Shift
Shape-Shift.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] shape-shifts into a Medium or Small Beast, Humanoid, or Undead creature, or it returns to its true form. Its game statistics, other than its size, are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn’t transformed.
Shape-Shift.chat: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] begins to transform into a different shape.

Jiangshi Weaknesses.name: Jiangshi Weaknesses
Jiangshi Weaknesses.description:
The [[lookup @name lowercase]] has these weaknesses:

Fear of Its Own Reflection. If the [[lookup @name lowercase]] sees its reflection, it immediately takes its Reaction, if available, to move as far from the reflection as possible.

Susceptible to Holy Symbols. While the [[lookup @name lowercase]] is wearing or touching a Holy Symbol, it loses its Immunity to the Frightened condition and automatically fails saving throws to avoid or end the Frightened condition.

Multiattack.name: Multiattack
Multiattack.description: Laurie makes two attacks, using [[/item Gossamer]] or [[/item Light Crossbow]] in any combination.

Deflect Blow.name: Deflect Blow
Deflect Blow.description:
Trigger: [[lookup @activation.condition activity=qvWn7DuBd5mmvZ1M]]

Response: The triggering attack’s damage is reduced by 5 ([[/r 1d10]]).
Deflect Blow.chat: Laurie quickly raises her arm to execute a swift parry, protecting herself or an ally from an incoming attack.

Damage Reduction.name: Damage Reduction
Damage Reduction.condition: An attack roll hits Laurie or a creature she can see within 5 feet.
Damage Reduction.activationCondition: An attack roll hits Laurie or a creature she can see within 5 feet.

Chain Mail.name: Chain Mail
Chain Mail.description: Made of interlocking metal rings, chain mail includes a layer of quilted fabric worn underneath the mail to prevent chafing and to cushion the impact of blows. The suit includes gauntlets.

Light Crossbow.name: Light Crossbow
Light Crossbow.chat: Laurie takes aim with her crossbow and fires a bolt.

Lesser Star Spawn Emissary.name: Lesser Star Spawn Emissary
Lesser Star Spawn Emissary.description:
@Embed[Compendium.dnd-ravenloft-horrors-within.book.JournalEntry.rhwBestiary00000.JournalEntryPage.mIP3ftLFnHIoSUSx cite=false caption=false]

Lesser Star Spawn Emissary

@Embed[Compendium.dnd-ravenloft-horrors-within.book.JournalEntry.rhwBestiary00000.JournalEntryPage.np8yUiOAyFa2s6Vf cite=false caption=false]

Star Spawn Emissary Lairs

@Embed[Compendium.dnd-ravenloft-horrors-within.book.JournalEntry.rhwBestiary00000.JournalEntryPage.gJqJZzXp0BXzLnus cite=false caption=false]

Multiattack.name: Multiattack
Multiattack.description: The emissary makes three attacks, using [[/item Lashing Maw]] or [[/item Invert Flesh]] in any combination.

Invert Flesh.name: Invert Flesh
Invert Flesh.description:
Constitution Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=8atRJX5oCM2EHRBm]], one creature the emissary can see within [[lookup @range.value activity=8atRJX5oCM2EHRBm]] feet.

Failure: [[/damage average]] damage.
Invert Flesh.chat: Without moving closer, the emissary turns its gaze on a creature and bends its form with alien force.

Teleporting Lash.name: Teleporting Lash
Teleporting Lash.description: The emissary teleports up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space it can see and makes one [[/item Lashing Maw]] attack.
